description_long: This is a two-story suburban house situated on a large grassy plot with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a combination of beige and light gray exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, and multiple symmetrically arranged windows provide ample natural light. The structure appears to have a garage attached to one side, with a driveway connecting to a main road. The windows are rectangular and evenly spaced, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of modern American suburban homes, with clean lines and practical layout.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, covered porch, attached garage, and symmetrically arranged windows on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage and the long driveway extending to the main road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house and the continuation of the grassy yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation and the driveway's connection to the road.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, and steps leading up from the driveway
